title: Health Information Systems Technician Mission and Vision
content:
Health Information Systems Technician Mission and Vision

Mission

Depending on the principles of our university, we can summarize as information processing activities with the knowledge, skills and responsibility awareness required by the Health Information Systems Technician Program; is to train technicians who can carry out national and international research activities on related issues, collecting information, sorting, organizing data, visualizing information, interacting with the user and similar issues on the computer and related issues.

Vision

In the field of technology in health, mobility, health services management, health web project, medical documentation, clinical information systems and Health Information systems, contributing to science and social development, respect for human rights, willing to learn, education and training quality in national and international level is to become a "Health Information Systems Technician" program that assumes and maintains its pioneering role and trains technicians that society needs.
